scripts.build: pnpm --filter datastar-kit build && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-counter build:only && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-todos build:only && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-live-counter build:only && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-live-counter-redis build:only && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-modal build:only && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-form-validation build:only && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-custom-actions build:only && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-linear-clone build:only && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-official-examples build:only && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-elysia-layout build:only && pnpm run check:deno-search-list && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/website build
scripts.check: pnpm run build && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.examples:check: pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-counter check && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-todos check && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-live-counter check && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-live-counter-redis check && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-modal check && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-form-validation check && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-custom-actions check && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-linear-clone check && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-official-examples check && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-worker-hono-counter check && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-worker-hono-live-todos check && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-worker-do-hono-live-todos check && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-elysia-layout check && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-syntax-check typecheck && pnpm run check:deno-search-list
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter datastar-kit typecheck && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-counter typecheck && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-todos typecheck && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-live-counter typecheck && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-live-counter-redis typecheck && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-modal typecheck && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-form-validation typecheck && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-custom-actions typecheck && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-linear-clone typecheck && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-hono-official-examples typecheck && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-worker-hono-counter typecheck && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-worker-hono-live-todos typecheck && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-worker-do-hono-live-todos typecheck && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-elysia-layout typecheck && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/example-syntax-check typecheck && pnpm run check:deno-search-list && pnpm --filter @datastar-kit/website typecheck
